trigger_email_summary: A fictional operator states that a refund was approved, but the demo wallet balance still does not reflect the credit after the stated processing window.

timeline_events.summary: Synthetic refund request opened after a failed transaction. Redaction warning: real wallet screenshots and transaction references must not be stored.
Operator confirms the fictional refund was approved.
Refund still not reflected after the promised processing window.

extracted_deadlines.action_required: Request refund proof and wallet reconciliation.

evidence_matrix.why_it_matters: Would show that the credit has not reflected.
Needed to prove whether the refund was actually processed.

missing_evidence: Wallet ledger before and after approval
company_response_gaps: Approval given but no proof of credit
recommended_next_action: Request refund proof, wallet ledger reconciliation, and a firm reflection date; escalate if not reflected by the chase deadline.
draft_reply_outline: Reference the synthetic refund approval date.
State that the credit is not reflected in the demo wallet summary.
Request processing proof and ledger reconciliation.
Ask for final reflection date or escalation path.

telegram_card_preview.title: DP-GAM-002: Approved refund not reflected
telegram_card_preview.body: High priority. Refund approved but not credited. Recommended: request processing proof and ledger reconciliation.

redaction_required.warning: Replace real wallet screenshots, transaction IDs, operator references, account names, and exact support text with synthetic summaries.
